tasks.name: Create loader file with React.cache wrapper
tasks.purpose: Scaffold the main loader file structure with server-only import, React.cache wrapper, and function stub that returns empty DashboardData

constraints: File must be at apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts
Must include 'import server-only' at top
Must export loadDashboardPageData wrapped with cache()
Function stub returns empty DashboardData object

tasks.input_state: No loader file exists, assumes DashboardData type available from F1
tasks.output_state: dashboard-page.loader.ts file exists with cache wrapper and empty loader function
tasks.acceptance_criterion: File exists with server-only import, React.cache wrapper, and exported loadDashboardPageData function

tasks.name: Implement loadCourseProgress helper function
tasks.purpose: Create helper function to fetch course completion percentage from course_progress table and count completed lessons from lesson_progress table

constraints: Query course_progress table for completion_percentage and current_lesson_id
Query lesson_progress table and count completed lessons
Return type matches CourseProgressData
Handle errors gracefully and return null on failure
Use RLS-protected client (no admin client)

tasks.input_state: Loader file exists with empty stub, database types available
tasks.output_state: loadCourseProgress helper function queries course_progress and lesson_progress tables
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function exists in dashboard-page.loader.ts, queries both tables, returns CourseProgressData or null

tasks.name: Implement loadQuizAttempts helper function
tasks.purpose: Create helper function to fetch latest quiz score and pass status from quiz_attempts table

constraints: Query quiz_attempts table for latest score and pass status
Order by created_at DESC and limit to 1
Return minimal quiz data (score, passed)
Handle errors gracefully and return null on failure

tasks.input_state: Loader file exists with empty stub
tasks.output_state: loadQuizAttempts helper function queries quiz_attempts table
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function exists, queries quiz_attempts, returns latest quiz data or null

tasks.name: Implement loadSkillsData helper function
tasks.purpose: Create helper function to fetch category_scores JSONB from survey_responses table for skills radar diagram

constraints: Query survey_responses table for category_scores JSONB
Order by created_at DESC and limit to most recent
Return type matches SkillsRadarData (structure, story, substance, style, self-confidence)
Handle errors gracefully and return null on failure

tasks.input_state: Loader file exists with empty stub
tasks.output_state: loadSkillsData helper function queries survey_responses table
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function exists, queries survey_responses for category_scores, returns SkillsRadarData or null

tasks.name: Implement loadTasksSummary helper function
tasks.purpose: Create helper function to fetch tasks with 'doing' status for kanban summary widget

constraints: Query tasks table where status = 'doing'
Select status and title fields
Return type matches KanbanSummaryData
Handle errors gracefully and return null on failure

tasks.input_state: Loader file exists with empty stub
tasks.output_state: loadTasksSummary helper function queries tasks table
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function exists, queries tasks where status='doing', returns KanbanSummaryData or null

tasks.name: Implement loadPresentations helper function
tasks.purpose: Create helper function to fetch presentations from building_blocks_submissions table

constraints: Query building_blocks_submissions table for id, title, created_at, status
Order by created_at DESC
Return type matches PresentationData array
Handle errors gracefully and return empty array on failure

tasks.input_state: Loader file exists with empty stub
tasks.output_state: loadPresentations helper function queries building_blocks_submissions table
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function exists, queries building_blocks_submissions, returns PresentationData[] or empty array

tasks.name: Implement main loader with Promise.all aggregation
tasks.purpose: Update main loader function to call all helper functions with Promise.all for parallel fetching, aggregate results, and add error handling with fallbacks

constraints: Use Promise.all to fetch all data sources in parallel
Wrap Promise.all in try-catch for error handling
Return fallback empty DashboardData on complete failure
Log errors using structured logger
Each helper failure should not crash entire loader (partial data allowed)
Return type must match DashboardData exactly

tasks.input_state: All helper functions implemented, main loader stub exists
tasks.output_state: Main loader calls all helpers with Promise.all, handles errors, returns DashboardData
tasks.acceptance_criterion: loadDashboardPageData uses Promise.all, calls all 5 helpers, has error handling, returns DashboardData

tasks.name: Wire loader into dashboard page
tasks.purpose: Call loadDashboardPageData in page.tsx Server Component and pass data to DashboardGrid component

constraints: Call loader in async Server Component
Pass dashboardData prop to grid component
Handle loading state with Suspense if needed
Page must remain a Server Component (no 'use client')

tasks.input_state: Loader function complete, page.tsx exists without loader call
tasks.output_state: page.tsx calls loadDashboardPageData and passes data to DashboardGrid
tasks.acceptance_criterion: page.tsx imports and calls loader, passes data to grid component, typecheck passes
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'loadDashboardPageData' apps/web/app/home/(user)/page.tsx && grep -q 'dashboardData' apps/web/app/home/(user)/page.tsx && pnpm typecheck
